valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 20 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 21 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low 250 miles northeast of Iceland 991, slow-moving, filling 999 by midday tomorrow. High Sole 1021 expected Forties 1030 by same time

Viking.text:
Wind
In northwest, southwesterly 4 to 6. In southeast, westerly or northwesterly 3 to 5.
Sea state
In northwest, moderate. in southeast, slight or moderate.
Weather
In northwest, showers. In southeast, showers.
Visibility
In northwest, good. In southeast, good, occasionally moderate at first.
